title: Infinite Restock
description: This simple datapack makes villagers never out of stock. Wait times no more!
body:
This datapack makes villagers never run out of stock.

You can trade with villagers indefinitely!

This datapack only removes the out of stock. If you don't have enough to trade it will not happen. 

Enjoy!

- Dank__Memer


Stats for nerds:

This pack works by setting the villager uses to the 32 bit integer limit on repeat.
